metadata.title: Australia — AUKUS, the critical-minerals pivot, the iron-ore China dependence, the $4T super pool, and the PsiQuantum quantum bet
metadata.status: the AUKUS terms, minerals framework, mining/China figures, super rules, and the PsiQuantum build are FACT (govt/SEC/reporting); the 'caught between US security and China trade' read is graded; composition guard applied (no unitary-mind attribution to states)
metadata.frame: The structural bind of a US-aligned economy dependent on Chinese demand. Five strands: (1) AUKUS — the US/UK security pact + the (revised, second-hand) nuclear-submarine program; (2) the CRITICAL-MINERALS pivot — the Oct-2025 US-Australia framework + a A$1.2B Strategic Reserve (antimony/gallium/rare earths) + Lynas as the first non-China heavy-rare-earth processor; (3) the IRON-ORE dependence on China (BHP/Rio/Fortescue) where China is exercising BUYER power (centralized purchasing, brand bans, pricing-index fights); (4) the ~$4T SUPERANNUATION pool; (5) the PsiQuantum Brisbane quantum bet (already a node). Ties to spec-quantum-computing-competitive-landscape (PsiQuantum), macro-critical-minerals (Lynas/MP Materials), spec-china-party-state (China buyer power), spec-semiconductor-logistics-standards. STRUCTURAL trend conclusion (no 'X feels Y'): Australia's revealed pattern is HEDGING — deepening US security ties while remaining export-dependent on the strategic rival.

the_aukus_pillar: AUKUS (Australia-UK-US, 2021) has two pillars: Pillar I (nuclear-powered submarines) and Pillar II (advanced capabilities — AI, quantum, hypersonics, cyber). The US DoD opened a review (Jun 2025) that rattled Canberra; Trump signaled support (Oct 2025). The program was REVISED: Australia now expects THREE SECOND-HAND US Virginia-class boats (instead of two used + one new), plus the longer-term British-designed SSN-AUKUS build; Australia paid the UK A$310M (Feb 2026) for long-lead nuclear-propulsion items. The high-risk submarine-transition timeline and the dependence on US/UK industrial capacity are the documented stress points. grade: fact.
the_critical_minerals_pivot: Australia is positioning as the West's alternative to Chinese mineral dominance. The US-Australia Framework for Securing Supply in Critical Minerals & Rare Earths was signed Oct 2025 (Albanese-Trump); Australia launched a A$1.2B Critical Minerals Strategic Reserve focused on antimony, gallium, and rare earths (all dual clean-energy + military uses). Lynas Rare Earths became the first company OUTSIDE China to produce commercial dysprosium oxide (May 2025, Malaysia plant, Mount Weld feedstock) — a genuine break in China's heavy-rare-earth monopoly. Ties to MP Materials (the US side) in macro-critical-minerals. grade: fact.
the_iron_ore_dependence: The counterweight: Australia's largest export (iron ore) goes overwhelmingly to China, and China is exercising BUYER power. In 2025 China centralized iron-ore purchasing (via China Mineral Resources Group) and imposed brand restrictions (e.g., BHP's Jinbao), costing BHP ~$2.8B in annual revenue; Rio Tinto and Fortescue switched their pricing benchmark away from the S&P Global Platts index for China term contracts. So the same state Australia is arming against (via AUKUS) is its dominant customer wielding monopsony leverage. grade: fact (the restrictions, the $2.8B, the index switch).
the_super_pool: Australia's superannuation system is a ~A$4T retirement-savings pool (Superannuation Guarantee reached 12% from 1 Jul 2025); the Division 296 tax (extra 15% on earnings on balances >$3M, 25% >$10M) passed Mar 2026. This is one of the world's largest pension pools and a major institutional-capital force (a candidate node for the uncovered-pools thread). grade: fact.
the_quantum_bet: Australia made a sovereign frontier-tech bet: the Commonwealth + Queensland committed A$940M to PsiQuantum's utility-scale fault-tolerant quantum computer near Brisbane (Moreton Bay; Lendlease builder; ground broken Jun 2026; targeted completion end-2027) — already a node in the quantum-landscape block. Plus domestic players (Silicon Quantum Computing, Diraq, Quantum Brilliance). grade: fact (the commitment); delivery timeline has slipped (contested execution).
the_honest_reading: Australia's revealed STRUCTURAL pattern (stated without attributing a unitary mind): it is simultaneously (1) deepening US/UK SECURITY integration (AUKUS, Pillar II in AI/quantum), (2) building a US-aligned CRITICAL-MINERALS alternative to China, while (3) remaining EXPORT-DEPENDENT on Chinese demand that China is actively weaponizing (iron-ore monopsony). That is a HEDGING / split-dependency posture — security with one bloc, trade with its rival — and the inconsistency is the finding (a worked example for the international-alignment-inconsistency thread). Composition guard: this describes Australian institutional ACTION and incentives, not a national 'mind' or 'feeling.' Overlay; excluded from the proofs.
